name: Five Iron Golf
address: 1000 W North Ave A200, Chicago, IL 60642
about: Five Iron Golf Lincoln Park is a modern, tech-driven indoor golf venue that combines simulator sports with a full-service bar and social atmosphere. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman technology in its simulator bays, offering access to over 200 virtual courses including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. It caters to a diverse range of golfers, from beginners practicing their swing to serious golfers refining their skills, alongside providing a social space for events and casual play. With amenities like a full bar, chef-inspired menu, and table games, it redefines indoor golf as an entertainment and practice destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate, actionable data for improvement
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible and welcoming for all skill levels
Combines driving range, clubhouse, and sports bar in one social venue

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu including appetizers, wings, and pizzas
Full-service bar available; BYOB policy not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar Trackman technology with high-speed swing cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Five Iron provides rental clubs and equipment; all you need to do is show up.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar and kitchen food menu; no BYOB policy is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and group size, but a typical round can take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue hosts kids' parties and welcomes families; children can enjoy the simulators and other activities.
